briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Define the LineWithMeta data structure — the fundamental building block of document text with rich metadata and annotation-aware slicing/joining/splitting.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: Text line with metadata: slicing, joining, splitting, concatenation, annotation merging, coordinate shifting. \par \b Input\/ \: Raw text string, optional LineMetadata, optional Annotation list, optional UID. \par \b Output\/ \: LineWithMeta instances with annotation-consistent operations. \par \b Links\/ \: [INHERITS(5): Serializable, Sized, USES_API(8): ApiLineWithMeta, READS_DATA_FROM(9): LineMetadata, Annotation, AnnotationMerger, BBoxAnnotation] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: UID is always auto-generated if not provided
annotations list is never None (defaults to empty list)
metadata is never None (defaults to page_id=0, line_id=None) \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why implement slicing/joining with annotation awareness? A: Annotations reference character positions; slicing without adjusting annotations would produce incorrect metadata. This class guarantees annotation integrity across all text operations. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Added semantic markup and LDD logging] \par \b Module Map\/ \:

CLASS 10[Document line with metadata and annotations] => LineWithMeta METHOD 6[Constructor] => init METHOD 8[Join lines] => join METHOD 7[Split line] => split METHOD 7[Slice line] => getitem METHOD 8[Concatenate] => add METHOD 6[Shift bbox] => shift METHOD 8[API schema] => to_api_schema \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
